title: Excalibur | Mutant Monsters
description: This is a support pack that converts Mutant Monsters Mod textures to better match the Incredible Excalibur ResourcePack.
body:
![Mutant Monsters](https://i.postimg.cc/Y9k9ydWz/Mutant-Monsters-Presentation-Support-1.png)

 

This is a support pack that converts [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) Mod textures to better match the masterpiece [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) ResourcePack.

Head over to the [Excalibur Discord](https://discord.gg/qYZ9Pen) to follow the development of Excalibur and this addon.

 This Pack contains :

- All Monsters Models textures and items have been changed to match Excalibur style/theme.  
- GUI retextured to better match the resourcepack Excalibur  
  

 Installation :

Ingame

-> Click "Options…"

-> Click "Resource Packs…"

-> Click "Open Resource Pack Folder"

-> Drag and Drop the Excalibur\_Mutant Monsters Support.zip file into the "resourcepacks" folder

-> Move the Excalibur Mutant Monsters Support resource pack from the left column to the right

-> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

-> Select "Done"

![Items](https://i.postimg.cc/RCdktgVx/Mutant-Monsters-items2.png)

Credits :

Maffhew - Author of the resourcepack [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)

Fuzs - Author of the mod [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters)
